---
title: "About"
page-layout: article
---

## Prof. Shin (phyzik)

Hello! I am **Prof. Shin**, an assistant professor specializing in AI and data science.

- PhD in Physics, Pukyong National University
- Assistant Professor, Department of Artificial Intelligence at Yuhan University
- AI-based atmospheric and environmental prediction modeling

## Research Areas

- **Causal Inference**: Transfer Entropy, PCMCI, IMV-LSTM
- **Time Series Deep Learning**: Transformer, LSTM, CNN-based forecasting
- **Atmospheric & Environmental AI**: FLUXNET CH₄ flux prediction, meteorological data analysis
- **XAI**: Explainable AI for environmental prediction

## About This Blog

This blog shares research and tutorials on AI, data science, and time series analysis.

## Contact

- GitHub: [github.com/phyzikst-web](https://github.com/phyzikst-web)
